name: Maren Ashveil
excerpt: Maren Ashveil is a mysterious client of Fen Caldra.
notes: Maren Ashveil is a client of Fen Caldra, who finds her interesting and hard to read. He has transported her twice and done small errands for her. Fen suspects she is searching for the Sunken Ledger but has not disclosed its existence to her.
